title: Step 1: Voice interface and recorder voice
description: Create lib/voices/recorder.lua and specs/voice_spec.lua. Recorder captures play_note calls into shared buffer with test helpers.

title: Step 2: MIDI voice backend
description: Create lib/voices/midi.lua with note-off timing via clock.run + clock.sync, active note tracking, retrigger, CC 123 cleanup.

title: Step 3: Refactor sequencer to use ctx.voices
description: Change sequencer.play_note from nb params to ctx.voices[track_num]:play_note. Add specs/sequencer_spec.lua.

title: Steps 4+5: Refactor app.lua + nb voice wrapper + norns entrypoint
description: Refactor app.init(config), create lib/norns/nb_voice.lua, update re_kriate.lua. One commit.

title: Step 6: Seamstress screen UI and keyboard input
description: Create lib/seamstress/screen_ui.lua and lib/seamstress/keyboard.lua. Add specs/keyboard_spec.lua.

title: Step 7: Seamstress entrypoint script
description: Create re_kriate_seamstress.lua wiring MIDI voices, screen UI, keyboard, app init.

title: Step 8: Integration tests and manual verification
description: Create specs/integration_spec.lua. Verify all tests pass with seamstress --test --test-dir specs.
